title: ai_studio/README.md
description: AI Studio root index: describes available capabilities, task routing, migration rules, map ownership, and where to go for each kind of work.
role: AI Studio root capability index and router

children.title: studio.mjs
children.description: Routing-only Studio command that describes stable owner entrypoints and runs fixed sequential shared verification suites without discovering game-owned tests.

children.title: studio.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies stable route descriptions, NUL-delimited changed-path selection, game exclusion, sequential suite plans, blocked gates, and bounded result envelopes.

children.title: studio_ci.test.mjs
children.description: Verifies the cross-platform GitHub workflow contract, pinned setup actions, recursive submodules, root Python bootstrap, and blocking verification without decision-free PR benchmarks.

children.title: studio-verify.yml
children.description: Runs the blocking full Studio verification matrix on Windows and Ubuntu with recursive submodules, Node 24, Python 3.12, and no repeated advisory benchmark.
